Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class IntegerVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifierNoOp<S,​T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractComparableVerifierNoOp<S,​T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractNumberVerifierNoOp<IntegerVerifier<T>,​T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.IntegerVerifierNoOp<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the integer number
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<IntegerVerifier<T>,​T>, ExtensibleIntegerVerifier<IntegerVerifier<T>,​T>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<IntegerVerifier<T>,​T>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<IntegerVerifier<T>,​T>, IntegerVerifier<T>
public final class IntegerVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
extends AbstractNumberVerifierNoOp<IntegerVerifier<T>,​T>
implements IntegerVerifier<T>
An IntegerVerifier that does nothing.
